Moonlight

A dark future. A broken system. Four survivors and one deadly world.

← Back to Projects
TypeComic Series
Issues1–3 Complete

PublisherEmberline Studios
CreatorJeremiah Chiedza

The Story

A World That Ended. Something Worse Moved In.

Moonlight is a post-apocalyptic comic series set in a shattered world where the collapse of civilisation wasn't the end — it was just the beginning. Monsters patrol the ruins. Factions war over scraps. And somewhere in the dark, four survivors are trying to stay alive long enough to figure out why any of it happened.

Deadly monsters. Dark secrets. Unlikely allies. The Starter Pack collects Issues 1–3 — the complete opening arc — plus creator notes and world-building insights from Jeremiah Chiedza.

This is not a story about heroes. It's a story about people who refuse to stop moving.

Moonlight Starter Pack — Issue 1–3. Story and Art by Jeremiah Chiedza.

Meet the Team

Four Survivors. One Deadly World.

Lead

Fenrir(Takeo)

Hardened, focused, and carrying more than a sword. Takeo moves like someone who's already accepted the worst.

Fighter

Luna

Sharp-tongued and sharper in a fight. Luna doesn't trust easily — and she's usually right not to.

The Quiet One

Emi

She watches more than she speaks. When she does speak, everyone listens.

Wildcard

Jonas

Nobody's sure whose side Jonas is really on — including Jonas.

Issue 1–3 — Read the opening arc in print or digital.

The Collection

3 Issues. 1 Epic Beginning.

The Starter Pack is the complete introductory arc — the world, the team, the threat, all in one collection. It includes creator notes from Jeremiah Chiedza with behind-the-scenes details on the world-building and story decisions that shaped Moonlight.

Available in print for collectors and digital for instant access anywhere in the world.
